{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = Kelarac’s burn
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] has a burn from [[Kelarac]] on his right arm.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c28">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 28</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire events]]
